cta.subtitle: Create your account today and start your journey towards mastery.
cta.title: Ready to join the community?

hero.subtitle: We believe learning should be an adventure, not a chore.
hero.title: Our Mission

story.p1: Traditional studying can feel isolating and repetitive. We wanted to build a platform that brings the thrill of gaming into the classroom, making it easier for students to stay motivated and retain information.
story.p2: By combining fast-paced interactive quizzes with a robust achievement system, we transform passive reading into active engagement. Whether you are studying for a massive exam or just learning a new hobby, Sqeez adapts to your pace.
story.title: Why we built Sqeez

v1.desc: Every feature we build is designed to make the learning experience smoother and more enjoyable for the user.
v1.title: Student First

v2.desc: Learning is better together. We foster a competitive but supportive environment where everyone grows.
v2.title: Community Driven

v3.desc: Your data is yours. We prioritize privacy and security so you can focus entirely on your education.
v3.title: Reliable & Safe

contact.subtitle: Our team is here to help you set up your digital classroom.
contact.title: Still need help?

q1.answer: Yes! Sqeez is entirely open source. You can download the code, host it on your own infrastructure, and modify it to fit your school's exact needs without paying any licensing fees.
q1.question: Is Sqeez really 100% free and open source?

q2.answer: We provide pre-configured Docker containers and comprehensive documentation. Your school's IT administrator can have the entire platform up and running in minutes.
q2.question: How difficult is it to deploy Sqeez?

q3.answer: You do. Because Sqeez is self-hosted, all student data, grades, and analytics stay securely on your own servers. We never track or collect your classroom's data, ensuring full GDPR and privacy compliance.
q3.question: Who controls the student data and analytics?

q4.answer: Students create secure accounts on your school's hosted instance. Once logged in, they can enroll in your specific subjects, complete assigned quizzes, track their ranking on live leaderboards, and gather XP to unlock achievements. It is a complete, gamified learning ecosystem!
q4.question: How do my students use the platform?

create.desc: Build your own question banks tailored to your curriculum, or remix existing public quizzes.

badges.title: Earn Badges & XP

quizzes.title: Lightning Fast Quizzes

features.subtitle: Everything you need to make studying engaging and effective.

hero.description: Challenge yourself, compete with friends, and track your progress. Earn XP and unlock exclusive badges as you level up your knowledge.

login.resendSuccess: Verification email sent! Please check your inbox.

logout.description: Are you sure you want to sign out?
logout.title: Confirm Logout

collection.p1: We collect the absolute minimum amount of data required to make the educational platform work:
collection.rule1: Account Data: When you register, we collect your name and email address to create and verify your account.
collection.rule2: Educational Data: We store your quiz results, earned badges, XP, and overall progress to track your academic performance.
collection.title: 2. What Information We Collect

contact.desc: To exercise your data rights or ask questions about how we handle privacy, contact the instance administrator at:
contact.title: Privacy Questions?

intro.p1: This platform runs on self-hosted, open-source software. This means all of your data is processed and kept strictly on the servers managed by the administrator of this specific instance. The creators of the open-source project have zero access to your data, and we do not sell your data to any third-party advertisers.
intro.title: 1. Who We Are & Where Your Data Goes

rights.p1: You have the right to request access to the personal data we hold about you, or ask us to correct or delete it entirely. If you wish to delete your account and all associated quiz data, please contact the administrator.
rights.title: 4. Your Rights

storage.p1: Your data, including your name and email, is stored securely in our instance's PostgreSQL database. Passwords are cryptographically hashed and never stored as plain text. We use session cookies and local storage solely to keep you logged in and functional while using the app.
storage.title: 3. How We Store Your Data

acceptance.p1: By accessing or using this educational platform, you agree to be bound by these rules. This instance is powered by open-source software, but your usage is governed by the administrators of this specific server.
acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms

accounts.p1: Whether you are registering as a student, teacher, or administrator, you must provide accurate information.
accounts.rule1: You are entirely responsible for maintaining the security of your password and account.
accounts.rule2: You may not share your account credentials or attempt to access other users' accounts.
accounts.title: 2. User Accounts & Roles

conduct.p1: As an educational platform, we expect honest and respectful behavior from all users.
conduct.rule1: Users must not engage in cheating, exploiting system bugs, or artificially inflating scores.
conduct.rule2: Creating quizzes or content that is offensive, illegal, or harassing is strictly prohibited.
conduct.title: 3. Acceptable Use & Academic Integrity

contact.desc: If you have any questions, please contact your instance administrator at:
contact.title: Questions about our Terms?

content.p1: Educators and users retain ownership of the quizzes and materials they create. However, by creating content on this instance, you grant the administrators the right to store, display, and distribute it within the platform.
content.title: 4. User-Generated Content

liability.p1: This open-source software and this hosted instance are provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. The instance administrators are not liable for any lost data, interrupted service, or the accuracy of user-generated quizzes.
liability.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
